pi_items.source: Task description specifies '~/Documents/WebLog/'. The setup script creates user 'ga', making the home directory '/home/ga'.
Task description explicitly requires the output file to be named 'divelog.html'.
Derived from the verified expected_dir and expected_file values based on the task description.
Downloaded SampleDivesV2.ssrf from the official Subsurface GitHub repository and verified it contains multiple dive location entries for 'Sund Rock'.
The source SampleDivesV2.ssrf file is approximately 1.6MB. A Subsurface HTML export bundles the dive data along with HTML/JS/CSS, guaranteeing a file size significantly larger than 10,000 bytes.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires exporting an interactive HTML logbook to '/home/ga/Documents/WebLog/divelog.html'. The underlying data is loaded from the official Subsurface 'SampleDivesV2.ssrf', which is a 1.6MB file containing real dive logs. Analysis of this source file confirms it includes the location 'Sund Rock'. Given the size of the source data and the HTML export format, the resulting output file will easily exceed the 10,000 bytes threshold.
